hero.description: Building scalable web applications with Laravel, Angular, Vue.js, Next.js, Nest.js, Strapi, Contentful, and Flutter. Focused on clean code, RESTful APIs, and delivering great user experiences.

about.title: About
about.description: Get to know the person behind the code
about.bio1: I'm a <bold>Full-Stack Developer</bold> and <bold>Electronic Engineer</bold> graduated <cyan>Summa Cum Laude</cyan>. I build scalable, production-ready web applications using Laravel, Node.js, Next.js, Python, and Angular — with additional experience in Vue.js, Flutter, and headless CMS platforms like <medium>Strapi</medium> and <medium>Contentful</medium>.
about.bio2: I care deeply about clean architecture, RESTful API design, database modeling, and shipping code that holds up under pressure. An engineering background means I bring rigor and first-principles thinking to every layer of the stack.
about.bio3: Beyond the screen, I'm a <medium>gym regular</medium> — consistency in training carries over to consistency in code. I'm also a <medium>space geek</medium> at heart; nothing resets perspective quite like thinking at cosmic scale.

skills.title: Skills &
skills.description: The tools and technologies I work with

openSource.title: NPM
openSource.description: 3 open source Strapi v5 plugins published to the NPM registry — solving real gaps in the Strapi ecosystem

projects.title: Featured
projects.description: A selection of projects I've built

coalitions-assessment.description: Healthcare patient management dashboard built as a frontend technical assessment. Features real-time vital signs, diagnosis history charts, and lab results.

inventory-management.description: A comprehensive inventory management system with credit control features. Built with Next.js and Neon database.

portfolio-website.description: My personal portfolio website showcasing my work and skills. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS.

sancrisoft-website.description: Corporate website for Sancrisoft, a software development company. Built as part of the development team.

sancrisoft-business-wizard.description: Multi-step business registration form built as a technical assessment for Sancrisoft. Features a clean wizard interface with form validation and progress tracking.

unet-grade-calculator.description: Academic grade calculator designed for UNET students to convert and project their grades throughout the semester.

trama-graph.description: Real-time gas sensor monitoring system with Arduino integration, featuring live data visualization, configurable alerts, and data persistence.

cycle-app.description: A Flutter mobile application for tracking women's menstrual cycles with predictions and health insights.

ensolvers-notes-app.description: Full-stack notes application with authentication, tagging, and archiving. Built as a technical assessment for ENSOLVERS.

sancrisoft.description: Full-time remote position building production web applications with Next.js and NestJS in an agile team environment.
achievements: Contributed to the development of the Sancrisoft corporate website using Next.js App Router with SSR, reaching 95+ Lighthouse performance scores
Contributed to the PWRL platform applying WCAG 2.1 AA accessibility standards — keyboard navigation, ARIA labels, and sufficient color contrast
Optimized image delivery with next/image and lazy loading, reducing initial page load time significantly
Architected NestJS REST APIs with modular structure and JWT authentication for secure, scalable data access
Enforced TypeScript strict mode across the codebase, eliminating runtime type errors before they reached production

tlux.description: Development of web systems using Laravel, Angular, Python, and Vue.js. Implementation of RESTful APIs for internal and external integrations.
achievements: Offloaded heavy processing to Laravel Queues and Jobs, reducing API response times and preventing request timeouts under load
Applied eager loading and indexed queries to eliminate N+1 database problems, improving data-fetch performance
Improved Angular front-end rendering using OnPush change detection and lazy-loaded route modules, reducing unnecessary re-renders
Designed versioned RESTful APIs with standardized error handling, consumed by both web and mobile clients
Integrated third-party services via API, automating workflows that previously required manual intervention
Enforced Git branching strategy (feature branches, pull requests, code reviews) across the development team
Integrated QuickBooks API to synchronize financial data between the platform and accounting workflows, reducing manual reconciliation

digital-node.description: Contributed to the development and refactoring of a fintech application serving thousands of users. Built customer-facing apps for banks and mobile recharge platforms.
achievements: Refactored legacy Vue.js codebase, reducing bundle size and improving Time to Interactive by ~35%
Contributed to a fintech app serving thousands of active users, ensuring high reliability, data consistency, and zero downtime deployments
Built a customer-facing banking app with full accessibility compliance — screen reader support, keyboard navigation, and WCAG-compliant contrast
Developed a mobile recharge platform with real-time status updates and a comprehensive admin panel for transaction management
Optimized Flutter app rendering by minimizing widget rebuilds with const constructors and efficient state management
Designed and optimized database schemas, improving query efficiency for reporting features and reducing load on critical endpoints

footer.tagline: Building digital experiences with code and creativity.
